description: Verso: Informal note in Judaeo-Arabic. The top line is a date written in Arabic script (15 Dhū l-Ḥijja). The next line may contain a variant of the basmala followed by בשם ייי. The next three lines are in Judaeo-Arabic but it's unclear if any of the substance can be understood. Ends "ve-shalom."
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
